desc: Fix intent gate friction: init-intent softening, evaluate-file, completion store warnings, structured report validation

init.desc: Synthetic init — roots all independent tasks

soften-init-intent.desc: Downgrade init-intent gate from hard error to warning in collectMakeErrors. Specs without hand-authored init-boundary intent rules should not be blocked at make time.

validate.statement: Plan clarity: init-intent gate change is scoped and unambiguous

evaluate-file-flag.desc: Add --evaluate-file <path> flag to advance command. Reads intent judgments from a JSON file instead of inline CLI arg. Keeps --evaluate for backwards compat.

completion-store-warning.desc: Log a warning when completed.json exists but is not a JSON array. Currently silently returns empty map, making orient think nothing is done.

structured-report-validation.desc: Replace minResponseLength with structured report validation. Prompt answers for terminal intent must parse as a completion report with required sections (COMMIT STATUS, TEST EVIDENCE, UNVALIDATED ASSUMPTIONS, FAILURE SURFACE, SCOPE DECISIONS, AUDIT TRAIL). Validate section headers present and each section non-empty.

integration-test.desc: End-to-end test: make a spec without init-boundary intent rules (passes), advance term with --evaluate-file pointing to a structured report (passes), advance term with malformed report (fails with section-level errors).
